fields.label: Source Field
fields.description: Field name or column header in the source file

fields.label: Target Field
fields.description: Target field name in Product Master (e.g., product_name, sku)

fields.label: Field Type
fields.options:
Standard Field
Attribute
Classification
Relationship
Media URL
Custom

fields.label: Attribute
fields.description: Target attribute for attribute field type

fields.label: Data Type
fields.options:
Text
Number
Decimal
Boolean
Date
Datetime
JSON
HTML
fields.description: Expected data type of the source field

fields.label: Required
fields.description: If checked, import will fail if this field is empty

fields.label: Is Identifier
fields.description: If checked, this field is used to identify existing records for updates

fields.label: Transformation
fields.options:
None
Uppercase
Lowercase
Trim
Slugify
Number Format
Date Parse
Boolean Parse
JSON Parse
Split to Array
Custom Script
fields.description: Transformation to apply to the source value

fields.label: Transformation Config
fields.depends_on: eval:['Number Format', 'Date Parse', 'Split to Array', 'Custom Script'].includes(doc.transformation)

fields.label: Default Value
fields.description: Value to use if source field is empty

fields.label: Validation Regex
fields.description: Regular expression to validate the source value

fields.label: Validation Error Message
fields.description: Error message to show when validation fails

fields.label: Lookup DocType
fields.description: DocType to lookup for link fields (e.g., Product Family, Brand)

fields.label: Lookup Field
fields.description: Field in the lookup DocType to match against (default: name)

fields.label: Create If Missing
fields.description: Create the linked record if it doesn't exist

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this field mapping
